Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Dewys for Marwa Elshawa.

The Court stated that it does not have a response to the Probate Examiner's notes and questions why this is a petition for preliminary distribution as opposed to final distribution. Mr. Dewys stated that there was an internal calendaring problem, that he will have a supplemental response on file within 10-days and correct any problems, and that he still intends to go with preliminary distribution. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution is continued to June 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Dewys is to file his supplemental response by June 13, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
